CREATE TABLE test_dsn (id INT, cost_stat FLOAT, updated_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dsn (id, cost_stat, updated_at) VALUES (1, 123.45, NOW());
INSERT INTO test_dsn (id, cost_stat, updated_at) VALUES (2, 678.90, NOW());
UPDATE test_dsn SET cost_stat = cost_stat + 10 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, cost_stat FROM test_dsn WHERE cost_stat > (SELECT AVG(cost_stat) FROM test_dsn);
SELECT ds1.id, ds1.cost_stat, ds2.cost_stat FROM test_dsn ds1 JOIN test_dsn ds2 ON ds1.id <> ds2.id WHERE ds1.cost_stat < ds2.cost_stat;
SELECT id FROM test_dsn WHERE updated_at > (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY') ORDER BY cost_stat DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dsn WHERE cost_stat IS NULL;
UPDATE test_dsn SET cost_stat = cost_stat * 1.1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dsn WHERE cost_stat < 200);
SELECT id, cost_stat FROM test_dsn ORDER BY random() LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE test_dsn_archive AS SELECT * FROM test_dsn WHERE false;
INSERT INTO test_dsn_archive SELECT * FROM test_dsn WHERE updated_at < (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAY');
UPDATE test_dsn SET cost_stat = (SELECT AVG(cost_stat) FROM test_dsn) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT ds.id, ds.cost_stat FROM test_dsn ds LEFT JOIN test_dsn_archive dsa ON ds.id = dsa.id WHERE dsa.id IS NULL;
